prompt: Change how sympy.core.mod.Mod evaluates: modify Mod.eval so that when the modulus is 1 it always returns S.Zero even for symbolic, non-integer, or assumption-free arguments, and reroute the existing gcd/normalization branch through this. Modify the existing evaluation path in place; do not just add a new branch guarded to the old behavior. Do NOT edit anything under a tests/ directory.

Change the domain-inference behavior in sympy.polys: modify construct_domain / Poly.__new__ so that any float coefficient makes the whole polynomial use the RR (real field) domain instead of the current QQ/EX choice, and update the existing inference logic in place rather than adding an opt-in path. Do NOT edit anything under a tests/ directory.

Change Piecewise evaluation: modify Piecewise.eval (or _eval_simplify) so that a Piecewise nested directly inside another Piecewise's expression is always folded/flattened into a single Piecewise during construction. Change the existing evaluation path in place. Do NOT edit anything under a tests/ directory.

Change relational canonicalization: modify sympy.core.relational so that Ge/Le are always rewritten to Gt/Lt-with-Or form during construction (Relational.__new__), altering the existing canonical form. Change the existing path in place. Do NOT edit anything under a tests/ directory.
